name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Primo Personal Loans offers express personal loans from $100 to $5,000 with no FICO score impact, operating out of Columbia, SC with select state availability.
description_long:
Primo Personal Loans is a consumer lending company headquartered at 1008 Gervais St STE 101, Columbia, SC 29201. The company appears to operate across multiple geographic markets — their website includes location-specific pages referencing cities such as Memphis — though the extent of their branch network is not fully disclosed on the site. They are reachable by phone at (803) 674-5822 and maintain an online presence with SSL and TSL security protocols in place. The company's copyright footer reads 2026, indicating it is an active business.

Primo Personal Loans offers what they brand as an "Express Loan," available in two amount tiers: $100 to $1,000, and $1,000 to $5,000. Prospective borrowers can request a free quote online. The application process is available digitally, though the company notes that online submissions may require additional verification that could delay funding by up to two business days. Specific interest rates, fees, and repayment terms are governed by state regulations and the applicant's individual financial profile — these are not disclosed publicly on the website.

One notable feature is Primo's credit inquiry policy: applying does not affect a borrower's FICO score. The company may pull a report from a non-traditional consumer reporting agency, which could affect the applicant's profile with that agency, but will not impact the widely-used FICO score. The website also includes a full accessibility toolbar with keyboard navigation, contrast adjustment, text resizing, and readable font options — indicating investment in inclusive design. The site complies with USA PATRIOT Act disclosure requirements, collecting identity verification information at the time of application.

Honestly, Primo Personal Loans operates with very limited rate and fee transparency. There are no APR ranges, term lengths, or example loan costs published on the website. Loan availability varies by state and not all applicants will qualify for the full amount requested. The company explicitly positions its products as short-term financial solutions, warning that they are not a substitute for long-term financial planning and recommending that borrowers in financial hardship consult a licensed credit counselor before applying. Borrowers seeking larger amounts or detailed pricing upfront will find the site lacking.
pros: Applying does not affect your FICO score — uses non-traditional CRA only
Loans available from as low as $100, accessible for very small emergency needs
Free quote available online before committing to an application
SSL and TSL security on the online application
Physical office location in Columbia, SC for in-person service
Accessible website with full toolbar: keyboard nav, contrast, text size, readable font
Phone support available at (803) 674-5822 for borrowers needing assistance
cons: No APR, fee, or repayment term information published on the website — zero pricing transparency
Maximum loan amount is $5,000 — unsuitable for larger borrowing needs
Online applications may be delayed up to two business days for fund release
Loan availability varies by state and not all applicants qualify for the full amount
Explicitly a short-term product only — not appropriate for ongoing financial needs
best_for: Borrowers needing a small loan ($100–$5,000) who want to avoid a FICO score inquiry while rate-shopping
South Carolina residents near Columbia who prefer in-person loan services
Consumers with non-traditional credit histories who may not qualify at mainstream lenders
Borrowers with a one-time short-term cash need who can repay quickly
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans is best suited for borrowers in select states who need a small, fast loan ($100–$5,000) and want to preserve their FICO score during the application process. The main caveat is near-total opacity on pricing — no APR ranges, fees, or term lengths are disclosed — so borrowers cannot evaluate cost before applying.
services: Online loan application with SSL/TSL security
In-person loan services at Columbia, SC branch
Multi-location lending (Memphis and other cities referenced)
Non-FICO credit evaluation (non-traditional consumer reporting agency)
